segments.speaker: 题目23/24
segments.text: Listen to a school radio announcement. We wanted to update everyone on the recreation facilities schedule. Starting next week, the gym and fitness center will close two hours early every night for maintenance. Both facilities will return to their usual hours before the end of the semester. We will inform everyone when the work is complete. When the facility reopens, everyone using the courts in the gym will be required to change their shoes before entering the gym area. We suggest keeping an extra pair of shoes in your locker.
